Short Description: SharePoint list view threshold exceeded
Engineer Comments: Web parts required updated permissions to data source. Granted access and parts now rendering.

Short Description: PowerPoint co-authoring conflicts
Engineer Comments: Workbook contained volatile formulas recalculating entire sheet. Optimised formulas and enabled manual calculation.

Short Description: OneDrive known folder move failing
Engineer Comments: Large file (2GB+) was timing out during upload. Split into smaller archives. Uploaded successfully.

Short Description: Teams 1:1 calls fine but group calls unusable
Engineer Comments: User switched to Teams web client - same issue. Rules out desktop client. Browser-based speed test shows 200Mbps+ so raw bandwidth isn't the problem. Issue is specific to real-time traffic.

Short Description: Password reset not sending verification code
Engineer Comments: Guest account was in wrong group. Added to correct access group and resources now accessible.
